cover.subtitle: Personal Investment Plan — Analysis Based on Real Historical Scenarios

confidenceAge.label: Confidence Age
confidenceAge.explainer: Your plan is sustainable with confidence up to this age in adverse scenarios.

projections.title: Projections
projections.subtitle: Projected wealth trajectory of Portfolio A over {{years}} years, with uncertainty bands built from 5,000 historical scenarios.

modeNote.nominal: Values in nominal USD (no inflation adjustment). To view them in today's USD, run the simulation in "real" mode.
modeNote.real: Values in real USD (deflated to today's USD using {{inflation}}% annual inflation).

howToRead.title: How to read this chart
howToRead.body: The solid line is the central scenario (median). The bands represent the range of uncertainty: the darkest one captures the middle half of scenarios (P25–P75); the lighter ones reach to the 5th and 95th percentiles. The dashed grey line is net contributed capital (deposits minus withdrawals) — when the median crosses below it, adverse scenarios are eroding the client's own capital.

tailRisk.title: Tail risk by horizon
tailRisk.footnote: P5 and P95 mark where the tail starts; CVaR (Expected Shortfall) tells you how deep it is on average. The industry shows the percentile; Mercantil delivers both.

projections.narrative: Your plan has a 90% probability of ending between {{lowBound}} and {{highBound}} at {{yearsHorizon}} years. In the worst 5% of scenarios, the average outcome is {{cvarLow}} (≈ −{{deltaPct}} below the central scenario).

planConfig.title: Plan configuration
planConfig.rulesEmpty: No active rules — initial capital only.

comparison.title: Portfolio comparison
comparison.subtitle: Risk and return over the plan window ({{start}}–{{end}} months · {{years}} years)

metric.shortfallProb: Prob. of ending below contributed capital

comparison.bandFootnote: Median in parentheses: P10–P90 bands across simulated paths.
comparison.ruinFootnote: Ruin and shortfall probabilities are scalars (they do not aggregate to percentiles). Ruin is measured over the full horizon; shortfall, at window close.

interpretation.title: Executive read
interpretation.body: The Δ column shows how much better (green) or worse (red) Portfolio B is than A on each metric. Read the median together with its P10–P90 band to gauge uncertainty — a favorable Δ at the median can coexist with an unfavorable Δ at the lower band, and that trade-off is exactly what the client conversation should address.

footer.confidential: Confidential document — for the exclusive use of the client and their advisor
